prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在 47–59 名区间（2026 年约第 59 名），属于中上游综合类高校，办学层次对考生有持续吸引力；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第 41 位（较热），短视频曝光度处于中上水平；历史无投档断档记录，报考心理稳定；新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，与物理类招生专业（临床医学、光电信息、网络空间安全、自动化、人工智能等）部分关联，药学、生物学等学科支撑相关专业。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年湖南省物理类考生约 34.7 万人，较 2025 年（约 32 万）增加约 8.4%，竞争有所加剧；电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业热度高热，计算机类推荐但明显降温，临床医学推荐但小幅降温；暨南大学位于广东广州，属华南地区热门高校；该校在湖南省招生占比约 2.5%–3.4%，属中等偏下水平，跨省报考竞争主要依赖学校综合吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024–2025 年位次大幅后移后企稳、2026 年物理类考生增加约 8.4%（竞争加剧）、招生计划连续两年扩招（2026 年再扩 2 人，竞争进一步加剧），以及学校声誉稳定、工科专业热度偏高等因素，在 2025 年基准 13804 名基础上预计竞争继续加剧；预测最低位次约 14159 名，区间 13659–14659 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 13659–14659 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<13700 名）可重点冲刺临床医学、口腔医学等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>14500 名）应以三档专业保底为主，注意避开生化环材等劝退专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 9355→9540→9461→13821→13804, stable in the 9355–9540 range from 2021 to 2023, with a significant drop to 13821 in 2024 (+4360 places), and roughly stable at 13804 in 2025; the ranking center has clearly shifted upward in the past 2 years, with a 2025 baseline of about 13804; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 34 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and significantly expanded to 51 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 53, an increase of 2 (+3.9%) compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of expansion, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable in the 47–59 range in recent years (approximately 59th in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle comprehensive universities, with a sustained appeal to candidates due to its academic level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major positive or negative public opinion events; Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; no history of enrollment gaps, stable application psychology; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, partially related to Physics Category enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Optoelectronic Information, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), with Pharmacy, Biology and other disciplines supporting related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 2025 (about 320,000), intensifying competition; majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are very popular, Computer Science is recommended but significantly cooling down, Clinical Medicine is recommended but slightly cooling down; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular university in South China; its enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is about 2.5%–3.4%, at a lower-middle level, with cross-province application competition mainly relying on the university's comprehensive appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop and stabilization of rankings in 2024–2025, an 8.4% increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), two consecutive years of enrollment expansion (another 2 places in 2026, further intensifying competition), stable school reputation, and relatively high popularity of engineering majors, competition is expected to continue intensifying based on the 2025 baseline of 13804; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14159, with a range of 13659–14659.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1697→1569→1827→2146→2178, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 609 places in the last 3 years; the baseline in 2025 is about 2178, only slightly down by 32 places from 2024, indicating a high-level stabilization; the enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan was 25 in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 28 in 2023, expanded to 34 in 2024, and reduced to 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 25, a slight reduction of 1 person (-3.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been stable in the 47–59 range in recent years (approximately 59th in 2026), placing it among mid-to-upper comprehensive universities, with a sustained appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major positive or negative public opinion events; Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an above-average level, reflecting moderate application attention; there is no history of admission gaps, indicating stable application psychology; it has 6 A- or above disciplines: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, covering multiple fields such as economics, management, law, literature, science, and engineering, with balanced disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan is about 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% compared to 2025 (about 142,500), sharply intensifying competition; among related major categories, Law and Chinese Language and Literature are relatively hot, while Finance/Economics are in a wait-and-see state, with overall application popularity stable; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular university in the South China region; its enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5%–3.4%, at a mid-to-low level, with no regional protection effect as a non-provincial university, and cross-provincial application competition mainly relies on the university's comprehensive appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase of about 31.2% in History Category candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), the slight reduction of 1 person in enrollment plan (limited easing effect), and factors such as stable university reputation and balanced disciplinary strength, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 2178; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2180, with a range of 1787–2573.
